privileged_info_summary: The task uses real NOAA CO-OPS (Center for Operational Oceanographic Products and Services) tide prediction data for October 15, 2025. Station 8518750 (The Battery, NY) and Station 8516945 (Kings Point, NY) are both valid NOAA stations. The NOAA API successfully provides tide predictions for the target date with 4 tidal events at each station: The Battery shows two highs (4.475 ft at 04:03, 4.901 ft at 16:24) and two lows (1.022 ft at 10:19, 0.513 ft at 23:07); Kings Point shows two highs (7.277 ft at 07:40, 7.501 ft at 20:09) and two lows (0.516 ft at 01:44, 0.903 ft at 14:07). All times are in local time (LST/LDT) and all heights are in feet relative to MLLW datum. The verifier correctly fetches authoritative ground truth data from the NOAA API at verification time.
